platform.name: meta
platform.paid_media_notes: Hook must be legible in the first second; CTA must settle by second 8.

format.safe_area: Keep primary text inside central 900x1500 px; avoid bottom app UI zone.

brand.name: Xalq Sigorta
typography: Inter Tight or Manrope for headlines
rules: Logos and readable campaign copy are deterministic overlays.
Do not ask the video model to create final Azerbaijani text.
Keep red as accent unless the approved key visual already uses it.

selection_criteria: smooth motion and thumb-stopping first second

text_policy.ai_text_rule: Generate a textless or low-text motion plate. Final copy is deterministic overlay.

reject_if: any visible foreground text is malformed
brand or partner logo is altered
product or vehicle geometry looks wrong
CTA cannot be read in the final two seconds
approve_if: motion supports the storyboard without distracting from the offer
all exact copy is deterministic overlay
brand colors and logo lockups match the brand kit
